name: ATTR-ACT tafamidis ATTR cardiomyopathy trial
summary: A 30-month phase 3 randomized trial testing tafamidis in transthyretin amyloid cardiomyopathy.

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Protein Aggregate Clearance because they can show whether the intervention changes health or disease-risk outcomes, function, and safety in 441 patients with transthyretin amyloid cardiomyopathy. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
